svg.text: 20 students · 1 teacher · 3 network layers (Operator Plane / Classroom Segment / Lab Fabric)

g.text: Outside the classroom — venue WAN, tailnet, instructor
Cisco 2960 — Gi1/0/1-20 = student access, Gi1/0/21 = teacher, Gi1/0/24 = trunk uplink to MikroTik
Row 2 (not shown for clarity): students 11–20 on Cisco Gi1/0/11–20 → IPs .111–.120
Inside ONE student Pi · unique per-student subnets (e.g. Student #5)
Each student gets unique subnets · this is one of 20 identical (but uniquely-addressed) Pi fabrics
sniffs all PCN traffic · EVE JSON → Promtail → teacher SIEM
Per-student subnets across 20 students: DMZ 10.75.{1-20}.0/24 · PCN 10.30.{1-20}.0/24 · ENT 10.50.{1-20}.0/24 (V4.1) = 60 unique /24s · MikroTik routes them all
